scope: manifest hash repair for the 94.0 cohort-eval gate after qrel fixture edits
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The real-qrel gate now resolves against the current fixture bytes instead of stale manifest metadata, so learner-facing cohort regressions read the same 200-query suite that the 94.0 baseline report was graded on.
notes: The verify gate previously failed only on manifest.r3.qrels.sha256 drift; query_count, schema_version, and baseline report alignment already matched.
This wave stayed inside lane-local state and reporting artifacts and did not touch any Pilot-locked corpus docs.
